rulings.Case Title: JULIUS BRIGGS VS. MISSION HOUSING DEVELOPMENT CORPORATION
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion For Protective Order Re: Pltf'S Counsel'S Conduct
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Friday, February 8, 2013, line 1. DEFENDANTS MISSION HOUSING DEVELOPMENT CORPORATION, ALTAMONT HOTEL ASSOCIATES, LP, ALTAMONT HOTEL, INC., CARITAS MANAGEMENT CORPORATION'S Motion For Protective Order Re: Plaintiff's Counsel's Conduct Grant, sufficient meet and confer and deposition sanctions of $1,500. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: JULIUS BRIGGS VS. MISSION HOUSING DEVELOPMENT CORPORATION
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion For Protective Order Re: Pltf'S 82 Sets Of Supplemental Request For Production Of Documents And Supplemental Interrogatories And Request For Sanctions
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Friday, February 8, 2013, line 1. DEFENDANTS MISSION HOUSING DEVELOPMENT CORPORATION, ALTAMONT HOTEL ASSOCIATES, LP, ALTAMONT HOTEL, INC., CARITAS MANAGEMENT CORPORATION'S Motion For Protective Order Re: Plaintiff's 82 Sets Of Supplemental Request For Production of Documents And Supplemental Interrogatories And Request For Sanctions Deny protective order. Response shall be provided as outlined in letter January 24, 2013 and January 31, 2013 by motion schedule. Grant sanctions to plaintiff for $2,125. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: PATRICIA HERNANDEZ et al VS. WELLS FARGO BANK, N.A. et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Order To Show Cause Re: Preliminary Injunction
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Friday, February 8, 2013, line 2. Order To Show Cause Re: Preliminary Injunction Deny preliminary injunction: (1) no evidence CCP 2923.5 applicability; (2) no exhibits attached to complaint re fraudulent representation and declaration of compliance. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: ERLINDA SAN JUAN VS. MICHAEL CIOFALO et al
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Friday, February 8, 2013, line 3. DEFENDANTS MICHAEL CIOFALO AND EVE SEGASTURE'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT Overruled, 5 days to answer; CCP 431.70 is not grounds for demurrer. Defendants' counsel shall comply with SFLR 2.6c in future i.e. provide copy of complaint. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: DONGNA FANG VS. ALENAH MITCHELL et al
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Friday, February 8, 2013, line 4. DEFENDANT ALENAH MITCHELL'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT Deny, triable issue of fact as to amount of rent due. See plaintiff's Exhibit D-3, lease amendment. = (501/REQ)
